query: Dolomitenlauf cross country ski race Obertilliach

videos.title: Highlights vom Dolomitenlauf am 22.1.2023 in Obertilliach, Classic Race über 42 und 20 Kilometer
videos.description: Was für ein Rennwochenende! 😍 Vielen Dank allen Mitorganisatoren und Helfern, allen Teilnehmern und Zusehern sowie allen Sponsoren und Partnern - ohne euer Zutun, euren Einsatz und eure Bemühungen wäre der Dolomitenlauf 2023 nicht derselbe gewesen! 💙

videos.title: 44.  Dolomitenlauf Obertilliach
videos.description: Bei traumhaften äußeren Bedingungen ging am Samstag in Obertilliach das Classic Race über 42 bzw. 20 km sowie der Kid‘s Race über die Bühne.

videos.title: 42. Dolomitenlauf Classic Race Obertilliach
videos.description:
Am Samstag fand der 42. Dolomitenlauf Classic Race in Obertilliach statt. 
Der Tscheche Stanislaw Rezac gewann das Classic Race. 
Als bester Österreicher kam der Vorarlberger Martin Sutter aus dem Bregenzer Wald auf den vierten Platz. Die beste Dame war Valentina Shechenko aus der Ukraine.

videos.title: 43. Dolomitenlauf in Obertilliach
videos.description:
Am vergangenen Sonntag fand der 43. Dolomitenlauf in Obertilliach statt. 

Der Franzose Ivan Perrillat Boiteux krönte sich zum Sieger des Dolomitenlaufes.

videos.title: 40. Dolomitenlauf im "Winterwunderland" Osttirol
videos.description: Der 40. Dolomitenlauf in Osttirol zog heuer so viele Langlaufbegeisterte wie nie zuvor an. Kein Wunder, bot doch Osttirol im Gegensatz zum Süden und Westen des Landes eine winterliche Märchenlandschaft, die jedes Wintersportlerherz höher schlagen ließ. Organisatoren und Osttirols Tourismus können mehr als zufrieden sein.

videos.title: Dolomitenlauf 2026 The Aftermovie!
videos.transcript:
The 56th edition of the Doitan La with
both start and finish at the Oberliaak
Bathon Center was once again a great
success with 1,200 participants.
Split evenly into 600 starters each day
from 34 nations. The event delivered
impressive performances over two days
featuring the skating race on Saturday
and the classic distance race on Sunday.
The Ditanl Austria's oldest popular
cross-country ski race enjoys an
excellent international reputation
within the scene.
>> The LA is a long tradition in East Tyro.
It is a long history shaped by many
idealists who have built this event over
the years. With great passion and
enthusiasm for cross country skiing, the
D mitten love radiates far beyond our
borders.
Since 1978,
we have been united with the world la as
a founding member bringing together the
20 largest nations which makes it as a
significant international event.
Athletes from 34 nations are at the
start line. This is also very important
for tourism as we are welcoming many
many guests who stay for longer periods
and worldwide within the crosscountry
skiing scene. The demitt has taken I
believe a leading role
on the opening day of the 56th edition.
The weather could not have been better.
Sunshine and slightly subzero
temperatures in Obertiliac provided
perfect crosscountry skiing conditions.
The skating race is a fast affair. Right
from the start, the pace has
significantly increased, quickly
spreading out the field. At the front
are the world leopard athletes followed
by the leisure skiers and those whose
main goal is simply to finish.
for the 20 km distance. The victory went
to 25year-old German Mario Mio Spower
who prevailed in the final meters
against his two breakaway companions
Julian Bruner from Italy and Tony Cher
from Germany. In the women's race,
Italy's Julia Kuwan claimed the win,
defeating Germany's Sophi Lexner in a
head-to-head battle.
>> It is my first time at the Demitt and a
fantastic way to start being able to win
at the sprint in my favor. I already
said that the finish line I will
definitely come back next year and
tomorrow I will race again as well. And
for that 42k next year, it's my goal to
win as well.
>> It was really great. I also like the
course very much. It was fast with
simply perfect conditions, excellent
tracks, a fantastic panorama, and great
to ski. The 40 km, Germany's Jacob Mils
in the men's race and Miriam Risene in
the women's race proved to be a class of
their own.
>> I didn't expect to be up that far in the
front, but it was really fun. We had
great equipment, great skis. The course
was just awesome, and I enjoyed it a
lot. Best Austrian result over the 40 km
distance were achieved by local favorite
Eva and Sturian Max both finishing in
third place.
I didn't know what to expect before the
race. I looked at the start list and saw
that all the strong competitors were
using TX and in the end I'm satisfied
with how it went.
In addition to the two traditional
distances, the dolomit and love also
offers a beginner category. In the 4 km
easy race, the focus is very much on
enjoyment and fun.
Sunday marks the highlight of the
dolomin, the classic race over 20 and 40
km.
While the sun was replaced by fog, this
did nothing to dampen the enthusiasm of
roughly 600 solders. Over the shorter 20
kilometer distance, a South Tirollian
celebrated victory. Thomas Arena
prevailed against the previous day's
German winner, Mario.
In the women's race, Germany's Alexandra
Dana took the win with Evastova
finishing fourth as the best Austrian.
The first lap still felt fast, but in
the second lap, you could really feel
the snowfall. After that, it got way
slower and also more demanding.
>> Are you satisfied with the race?
>> Yes, but not entirely. Yesterday, I was
struggling physically, but overall, it's
okay so far.
In the long distance race, an eightman
leading group dominated almost the
entire course. In the end, however, it
came down to a thrilling sprint finish
between two Italian athletes.
Lorenzo Busin had the fastest legs,
narrowly beating his TanTino teammate
Franchesco Ferrari in the final sprint.
>> It was a quite a tough race. like we
tried to attack a few times. So it was
not like a let's say steady pace. It was
more like attacks and then we went like
slow like technical. But uh it was good
like with me and my teammate we could
like be on the top group with like four
people and we managed to be like both on
podium. So it was uh very very good.
In the women's race, Anna Mitova
delivered an outstanding result for the
home team. After finishing third last
year, she improved once again in 2026,
securing an excellent second place
behind Marlin Boris, who already had won
the domitten love two years ago.
>> The first lap was tough, but after that,
the man really pulled us along, which
made it way more comfortable. I already
knew that the attack would come
somewhere in the final lap. Marlin
attacked and it's a joy actually when a
team weight wins. I also had a good time
at the doom.
The organizing comedy chairman France
Toil was also very satisfied. The trails
at the Oberllathon Center were in
excellent condition. Only with these
conditions and the support of numerous
volunteers it was possible to stage such
an event.
We are very satisfied. We surpassed the
last year's number of participant and
the conditions were excellent too.
Athletes from 34 nations are very happy
and they can actually also take a great
experience back home with them. From
tomorrow on the work for the 57th
edition of the Doomitt in 2027 begins.
But as every year the true winners were
all those who crossed the finish line
and proudly received the coveted dolomin
medal.

videos.title: Dolomitenlauf 2023 Skating races
videos.description: This was day one of Dolomitenlauf 2023. The skating races have been on the program with all French winners.

videos.title: 56th Dolomitenlauf 2026 – The detailed race report
videos.description:
Race weekend on perfect trails: The 56th Dolomitenlauf 2026, a founding member of Worldloppet, thrilled 1,200 participants from 34 nations. A detailed report by @K19at with impressions of the cross-country ski trail and the authentic Dolomitenlauf atmosphere.

📹: @K19at 
#dolomitenlauf #osttirol #worldloppet
